mapper.insert: insert into daily_checkins (user_id, checkin_date) value (#{userId}, CURDATE())
mapper.select: select exists(select 1 from daily_checkins where user_id = #{userId} and checkin_date = CURDATE()) as is_checked
select checkin_streaks.last_checkin_date from checkin_streaks where user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: INSERT INTO checkin_streaks (user_id, current_streak, longest_streak, last_checkin_date) VALUES (#{userId}, #{newStreak}, #{newStreak}, #{today}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE current_streak = #{newStreak}, longest_streak = GREATEST(longest_streak, #{newStreak}), last_checkin_date = #{today}
